docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BHATTACHARYYA, GAUTAM AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BHATTACHARYYA, GAUTAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $57,863.60 PRINCIPAL, $792.86 INTEREST, $292.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $58,948.96, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
